top.name: Grave Eruption
top.rules_text: All corpse tiles deal 4 damage to adjacent enemies. Corpses become bone piles.

channel.name: Grave Eruption (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Bone piles also immobilize adjacent enemies for 1 turn

bottom.name: Raise Abomination
bottom.rules_text: Consume 2 corpses within range 3. Raise an Abomination (24HP 8DMG 1SPD) on one of the consumed tiles.

channel.name: Raise Abomination (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Abomination enters with Regenerate (heal 3 at start of each turn)
